rationale.R1.3: The output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is not disclosed for all recommendations, only for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces a new error by falsifying the headline claim with data from the section itself.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
